description: Configure the local Docker CLI to securely manage a remote Docker daemon using Docker Contexts and Mutual TLS. Create a Docker Context named 'prod' that connects to the 'prod-node' container (located on the 'prod-net' network) on port 2376 using the certificates in ~/credentials/ (ca.pem, cert.pem, key.pem). Deploy a container named 'prod-web' using the 'nginx:1.24-alpine' image to the remote daemon using the 'prod' context.
